_scenario: Demand/competition (P2, zero PII): 'How competitive is the bidding on John Deere combines?'. Routes to structured_query template demand_metrics — AGGREGATE COUNTS ONLY, never bidder identity. Shapes satisfy structured_query + analyze output schemas.

structured_query.filter_notes: John Deere combines; bid/watch activity aggregated across 38 lots; no bidder identity

analyze.answer: Bidding on John Deere combines is competitive: 412 bids from 96 distinct bidders across 38 lots (about 11 bids per lot), with 233 watchers tracking them.
